evidence_required: Literature condition must be nitrogen-fixing; N2 metabolite `cpd00528[c0]` must be allowed external supply or demand convention must match ModelSEED/COBRA practice.
rationale: v1.13 contains intracellular N2 and nitrogenase but lacks an N2 exchange, making forced nitrogenase infeasible.
risk: Adding boundary can create artificial nitrogen fixation or alter nitrogen-source phenotypes if applied broadly.
required_before_after_tests: Baseline phenotype panel; FBA/pFBA/FVA on acetate/succinate/butyrate/fumarate; nitrogenase and H2 FVA; MEMOTE/COBRA consistency; no changes to non-nitrogen-fixing conditions.

evidence_required: McKinlay/Harwood and CGA009 ME-model nitrogen-fixing/H2 conditions; v1.13 nitrogen boundary audit; hypothetical N2 boundary test.
rationale: Temporary N2 boundary restores feasibility of forced minimal nitrogenase under all four tested carbon sources.
risk: Must avoid enabling unsupported nitrogen fixation in ammonium-rich or non-nitrogen-fixing validation conditions.
required_before_after_tests: Create candidate model with N2 boundary disabled by default or condition-specific; rerun phenotype panel, MEMOTE/COBRA, and nitrogenase/H2 FVA before acceptance.
